verdict: NOT-ZERO-GAPS — semantic closure is incomplete; branch cut is BLOCKED. 22 capabilities require V1 completion and 10 deprecated zero-consumer packages await delete-after-proof execution. Configuration is closed: V1C-CONF-06 delivered (all product-runtime direct process.env reads migrated to typed config; the no-direct-process-env-outside-config Semgrep gate is active). Zero gaps may only be claimed when `npm run v2:readiness` exits 0.

cutReadiness.composition: 25 requires-v1-completion capabilities + 10 deprecated packages = 35. Config is closed: V1C-CONF-01..08 delivered (ADR-0076 + the two-tier secret model) and V1C-CONF-06 completed — all product-runtime direct process.env reads migrated to typed projections, product-runtime sprawl = 0, and the no-direct-process-env-outside-config Semgrep ERROR gate enforces it.
cutReadiness.configSprawl: V1C-CONF-06 progress metric (NOT one of the 36; V1C-CONF-06 is the single config blocker until closed): v1-config-consumption.directAccessOutsideCompositionKeyCount = product-runtime direct env reads still to migrate into typed projections (the remaining target is the platform-api server runtime). approvedExceptionKeyCount = reads confined to approved NON-product boundaries (operator-script scripts/**, dev-ci-tooling tools/**, web-build vite.config.* — each a composition root / CI tool with its own contextual defaults). The exception list is enforced in the closure commit.
